name: pmode
transitions: real->protected (CR0.PE 0->1, CS far-jump to 32-bit code segment)
description: Bare-metal real->protected->paging demonstrator for the M2S.0 system-mode oracle. Boots from the F000:FFF0 reset vector in 16-bit real mode, loads a flat GDT, sets CR0.PE and far-jumps into a 32-bit protected-mode code segment, runs a handful of PM instructions, builds a 4 MiB identity PSE page directory, sets CR4.PSE + CR3 + CR0.PG, runs a few more paged instructions, then exits via out 0xf4 (isa-debug-exit -> qemu status 133).
